entities.name: ValidationResult
entities.context: Represents the result of a validation process during onboarding.

entities.name: OnboardingError
entities.context: Represents an error encountered during the onboarding process.

entities.name: logger
entities.context: Used for logging error and warning messages.

entities.name: validator
entities.context: Used to validate the onboarding process.

relationships.context: ValidationResult can lead to an OnboardingError if critical errors persist.
Validator is used to produce a ValidationResult during the onboarding process.
Logger is used to log messages based on the ValidationResult.
